title: AlooSMP
description: Viral "Aloo Khaoge?" trend plugin with 17 collectible potato variants
body:
# **AlooSMP Plugin**

**AlooSMP** is a plugin following the (Aloo Khaoge🥔) trend and puts 17 new Potato variants in Minecraft, Each Aloo has its own ability encouraging players to collect all Aloo variants

All players joining for first time after the plugin installation will get a random aloo variant according to rarity of aloo, you can **configure 99% of things**

You can also get aloos by **farming potatoes**, but there are limits like cooldowns and there are multipliers like thunerstorm too, so its kinda balanced

**Supports Luckperms And Vault***

### **Variants-**
- Russet Aloo **(Common)**
- Sweet Aloo **(Common)**
- Purple Aloo **(Uncommon)**
- Golden Aloo **(Rare)**
- Rainbow Aloo **(Epic)**
- Diamond Aloo **(Legendary)**
- Mashed Aloo **(Common)**
- Fried Aloo **(Uncommon)**
- Boiled Aloo **(Uncommon)**
- Frozen Aloo **(Uncommon)**
- Cloud Aloo **(Uncommon)**
- Spicy Aloo **(Rare)**
- Ghost Aloo **(Rare)**
- Iron Aloo **(Rare)**
- Magma Aloo **(Rare)**
- Thunder Aloo **(Epic)**
- Emerald Aloo **(Epic)**

### **Abilities-**
- Russet Aloo - **Regen II - Heals 4 hearts over time**
- Sweet Aloo - **Jump Boost III - Jump 3 blocks high**
- Purple Aloo - **Night Vision - See Clearly In Dark**
- Golden Aloo - **Fire Resistance - Immune To Fire And Lava**
- Rainbow Aloo - **Speed, Jump, Regen, Resistance For 8 Seconds**
- Diamond Aloo - **Absorption IV - Gain Temporary 8 hearts**
- Mashed Aloo - **Saturation - Instantly fills your hunger bar**
- Fried Aloo - **Speed III - Run 40% faster**
- Boiled Aloo - **Water breathing + Dolphin's Grace**
- Frozen Aloo - **Frost Walker III - Freeze nearby water blocks**
- Cloud Aloo - **Slow Falling And Levitation**
- Spicy Aloo - **Strength II - Deal more damage**
- Ghost Aloo - **Invisibility + No Mob Aggro**
- Iron Aloo - **Resistance III - Reduce damage by 60%**
- Magma Aloo - **Set nearby entities on fire**
- Thunder Aloo - **Spawns a thunder bolt at the place you are looking**
- Emerald Aloo - **Luck V - Get good mob drops**

- ![Helpful Commands](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3cbe96504f8d3cc2f3e679fc460793890f4b9f4d.png)

### **How To Install Plugin-**
- Go to the [versions](https://modrinth.com/plugin/aloosmp/versions) page
- Click On [AlooSMP 1.0.0](https://modrinth.com/plugin/aloosmp/version/1.0.0)
- Download both plugin and resource pack, resource pack is optional
- Put the plugin in your server's plugin folder
- If u downloaded the resource pack, open your minecraft esc menu -> options -> resource-packs -> Open pack folder -> add the downloaded resource pack to the opened folder -> close folder -> drag the resource pack to right side -> click Done
